name: Feature request

## Summary
A brief description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem it solves
What workflow or pain point does this address?

## Proposed solution
How you'd like it to work. Include any UI ideas if relevant.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context
Any other notes, screenshots, or examples.
